---
title: "connected_components"
generated: true
description: "Label connected foreground regions of `mask`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.morphology`](../nitrix-morphology.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.morphology._label`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:connected_components -->
```python
connected_components(mask: Bool[Array, '*spatial'], *, connectivity: int = 1) -> Int[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:connected_components -->
Label connected foreground regions of `mask`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:connected_components -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mask` | `Bool` | `*spatial` | — | Boolean (or 0/1) array; non-zero entries are foreground. |
| `connectivity` | `int` | — | `1` | Neighbourhood order in `[1, ndim]`: `1` = face neighbours only, `ndim` = full (including diagonals). Follows scipy's `sum(abs(offset)) <= connectivity` rule. |

**Returns** `Int` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:connected_components -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
